chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 6451 of 2020 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of CMA No.27729/2020. 3. For hearing of main case. 13.02.2025 Qazi Umair Ali, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh. Counsel states that this petition impugnes notice, however, the same shall be contested before the issuing authority. It is stated that the respondent department may be directed to adjudicate the same vide a speaking order, after providing opportunity of hearing, however, during pending aforesaid, no further coercive action be taken against the petitioners. Learned AAG has no cavil to the aforesaid and states that the petition may be disposed of in the above terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
